description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low perimeter wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a large, flat roof with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic, complemented by a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. The front yard is spacious, with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance and a garage area. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. The backyard includes a private patio and a small pool, partially enclosed for privacy. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, and a mix of white and wood finishes. Features large windows, a garage, and a private backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, backyard patio, pool area, and more dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, side entrance, and a clear view of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the main entrance, wood paneling, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
